mapper.select: select column_id, table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gen_table_column where column_id = #{columnId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into gen_table_column(id,table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{entity.id},#{tableId}, #{columnName}, #{columnComment}, #{columnType}, #{javaType}, #{javaField}, #{isPk}, #{isIncrement}, #{isRequired}, #{isInsert}, #{isEdit}, #{isList}, #{isQuery}, #{queryType}, #{htmlType}, #{dictType}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into gen_table_column(id,table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.tableId}, #{entity.columnName}, #{entity.columnComment}, #{entity.columnType}, #{entity.javaType}, #{entity.javaField}, #{entity.isPk}, #{entity.isIncrement}, #{entity.isRequired}, #{entity.isInsert}, #{entity.isEdit}, #{entity.isList}, #{entity.isQuery}, #{entity.queryType}, #{entity.htmlType}, #{entity.dictType}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into gen_table_column(id,table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.tableId}, #{entity.columnName}, #{entity.columnComment}, #{entity.columnType}, #{entity.javaType}, #{entity.javaField}, #{entity.isPk}, #{entity.isIncrement}, #{entity.isRequired}, #{entity.isInsert}, #{entity.isEdit}, #{entity.isList}, #{entity.isQuery}, #{entity.queryType}, #{entity.htmlType}, #{entity.dictType}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update table_id = values(table_id), column_name = values(column_name), column_comment = values(column_comment), column_type = values(column_type), java_type = values(java_type), java_field = values(java_field), is_pk = values(is_pk), is_increment = values(is_increment), is_required = values(is_required), is_insert = values(is_insert), is_edit = values(is_edit), is_list = values(is_list), is_query = values(is_query), query_type = values(query_type), html_type = values(html_type), dict_type = values(dict_type), sort = values(sort), create_by = values(create_by), create_time = values(create_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
